children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, return success or error
postconditions: patient is stored in patients data store

call_inputs.name: patient_data
call_inputs.description: Patient registration details from parent input

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and store new patient

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

global_vars.description: Access patients data store for uniqueness check and insertion

data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient

constraints.description: Patient data must be valid JSON with required fields

acceptance_criteria.description: New patient is stored and a unique ID is returned

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, return success or error
postconditions: appointment is stored in appointments data store

call_inputs.name: appointment_data
call_inputs.description: Patient ID and appointment details from parent input

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check slot availability and store appointment

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

global_vars.description: Read patients data store to verify patient exists
Read and write appointments data store for slot check and booking

data_operations.description: Check slot availability and store appointment

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment is stored and a unique ID is returned

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID, verify patient exists, fetch records from patients data store, return records or error

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and fetch records

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, records data, and message

global_vars.description: Read patients data store to verify patient and fetch records

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and fetch records

constraints.description: Records are append-only, no modification allowed

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields, verify patient exists, update patient data store, return success or error

call_inputs.name: update_data
call_inputs.description: Patient ID and updated fields from parent input

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and update profile

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and message

global_vars.description: Read and write patients data store to verify and update profile

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and update profile

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated with only the specified fields

governance_notes: All children are pure functions with no side effects beyond data store operations. Constraints and acceptance criteria derived from preconditions, postconditions, and guarantees. Traceability links each child to its functional requirement.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures remain exactly as in Stage 2.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each child's internal_leaf_accesses map directly to global_vars and data_operations with matching resource names and operation types.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child, global_vars and data_operations lists are synchronized: each resource/op pair appears in both lists with consistent descriptions.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources from internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations. No extra resources introduced.
